log.out:
available games:
  play mines  reveal/flag cells, don't hit a mine (9×9, 10 mines)
  play 2048   slide tiles, w/a/s/d or up/down/left/right
  rps <r|p|s> rock paper scissors
  guess <n>   1-100, guess my number

vault.enc is sealed. the key is in plain sight, base64'd:
  b3Blbi1zZXNhbWU=
  decode it, then:  unlock <key>
